THERESA-PURE_WATER.title: PureWater
THERESA-MAO_CREST.title: MaoCrest
THERESA-NAMELESS_TOTEM.description:
Upon pickup, choose [blue]{SelectCount}[/blue] cards from your deck to [red]Remove[/red].
For each [red]Attack[/red] removed, add a [gold]Sarkaz See[/gold] to your deck.
For each [blue]Skill[/blue] removed, add a [gold]Sarkaz Tell[/gold] to your deck.
THERESA-NAMELESS_TOTEM.flavor: A faceless totem, said to have once belonged to someone nameless.
THERESA-NAMELESS_TOTEM.title: Nameless Totem
THERESA-BABEL_WORD.title: The Final Chapter
THERESA-BABEL_WORD.description:
At the start of your turn, draw cards equal to the difference if your [orange]Dust[/orange] count is below the cap.
At the end of your turn, [orange]Dust[/orange] cards that were [gold]Lingered[/gold] this turn gain [red]Ethereal[/red] and [red]Exhaust[/red], then move to the discard pile.
THERESA-BABEL_WORD.flavor: The legacy of Babel, the last page of the story.
THERESA-UNKNOWN_RELIC.title: Unparsed Code
THERESA-UNKNOWN_RELIC.description:
Records the number of actions executed in combat.

During card rewards, you may [gold]Record[/gold]: randomly save 1 card to the removed cards list (without adding it to your deck).
THERESA-UNKNOWN_RELIC.flavor: You don't need to understand how it works. You only need to acknowledge this fact: it interprets the essence of this world.
THERESA-KNOWN_RELIC.title: Civilight Eterna
THERESA-KNOWN_RELIC.description:
Has recorded [blue]{ActionCount}[/blue] actions.

Upon reaching each threshold, gain the corresponding effect at the start of combat:
[blue]2000[/blue]: Gain 1 [green]Strength[/green] and [green]Dexterity[/green].
[blue]4000[/blue]: Also gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw 1 card.
[blue]6000[/blue]: Also put a random [blue]Power[/blue] card into your hand with 0 cost.
[blue]8000[/blue]: Also gain 5 [green]Max HP[/green] (reverted after combat).
[blue]10000[/blue]: Once only, heal to 100% HP upon receiving fatal damage.
THERESA-KNOWN_RELIC.flavor: A small black crown. Now you know what it carries.
